    GitHub v3 REST API

    v1.1.4

    Terms of Service

    Base URL
    https://api.github.com

    GitHub's v3 REST API.

    gists

    View, modify your gists.

    List gists for the authenticated user

    GET
    https://api.github.com/gists

    Lists the authenticated user's gists or if called anonymously, this endpoint returns all public gists:

    Parameters

    sincestring<date-time>query

    Only show results that were last updated after the given time. This is a timestamp in ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ.

    per_pageinteger30query

    The number of results per page (max 100). For more information, see "Using pagination in the REST API."

    pageinteger1query

    The page number of the results to fetch. For more information, see "Using pagination in the REST API."

    Response

    200OKArray<base-gist>

    Response

    304Not Modified

    Not modified

    403Forbiddenbasic-error

    Forbidden

    List gists for the authenticated user
    Copy
    curl -X GET 'https://api.github.com/gists'
    const response = await fetch('https://api.github.com/gists', {
  method: 'GET',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.get('https://api.github.com/gists')
data = response.json()

  {
    "url": "https://api.github.com/gists/aa5a315d61ae9438b18d",

    List gists for the authenticated user
    Copy
    curl -X GET 'https://api.github.com/gists'
    const response = await fetch('https://api.github.com/gists', {
  method: 'GET',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.get('https://api.github.com/gists')
data = response.json()

    Create a gist

    POST
    https://api.github.com/gists

    Allows you to add a new gist with one or more files.

    [!NOTE] Don't name your files "gistfile" with a numerical suffix. This is the format of the automatic naming scheme that Gist uses internally.

    Body

    application/json
    descriptionstring

    Description of the gist

    filesobjectrequired

    Names and content for the files that make up the gist

    publicboolean | string

    Response

    201Createdgist-simple

    Response

    304Not Modified

    Not modified

    403Forbiddenbasic-error

    Forbidden

    404Not Foundbasic-error

    Resource not found

    422Unprocessable Entityvalidation-error

    Validation failed, or the endpoint has been spammed.

    Create a gist
    Copy
    curl -X POST 'https://api.github.com/gists' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "description": "Example Ruby script",
    "files": {
      "hello.rb": {
        "content": "puts \"Hello, World!\""
      }
    },
    "public": true
  }'
    const response = await fetch('https://api.github.com/gists', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
      "description": "Example Ruby script",
      "files": {
        "hello.rb": {
          "content": "puts \"Hello, World!\""
        }
      },
      "public": true
    }),
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

payload = {
  "description": "Example Ruby script",
  "files": {
    "hello.rb": {
      "content": "puts \"Hello, World!\""
    }
  },
  "public": True
}

response = requests.post('https://api.github.com/gists', json=payload)
data = response.json()
    Request Body
    Copy
    {
  "description": "Example of a gist",
  "public": false,
  "files": {
    "README.md": {
      "content": "Hello World"
    }
  }
}

        "content": "puts \"Hello, World!\""

    },
    "public": true

    List public gists

    GET
    https://api.github.com/gists/public

    List public gists sorted by most recently updated to least recently updated.

    Note: With pagination, you can fetch up to 3000 gists. For example, you can fetch 100 pages with 30 gists per page or 30 pages with 100 gists per page.

    Parameters

    sincestring<date-time>query

    Only show results that were last updated after the given time. This is a timestamp in ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ.

    per_pageinteger30query

    The number of results per page (max 100). For more information, see "Using pagination in the REST API."

    pageinteger1query

    The page number of the results to fetch. For more information, see "Using pagination in the REST API."

    Response

    200OKArray<base-gist>

    Response

    304Not Modified

    Not modified

    403Forbiddenbasic-error

    Forbidden

    422Unprocessable Entityvalidation-error

    Validation failed, or the endpoint has been spammed.

    List public gists
    Copy
    curl -X GET 'https://api.github.com/gists/public'
    const response = await fetch('https://api.github.com/gists/public', {
  method: 'GET',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.get('https://api.github.com/gists/public')
data = response.json()
    Copy
    [
  {
    "url": "https://api.github.com/gists/aa5a315d61ae9438b18d",
    "forks_url": "https://api.github.com/gists/aa5a315d61ae9438b18d/forks",
    "commits_url": "https://api.github.com/gists/aa5a315d61ae9438b18d/commits",
    "id": "aa5a315d61ae9438b18d",
    "node_id": "MDQ6R2lzdGFhNWEzMTVkNjFhZTk0MzhiMThk",
    "git_pull_url": "https://gist.github.com/aa5a315d61ae9438b18d.git",
    "git_push_url": "https://gist.github.com/aa5a315d61ae9438b18d.git",
    "html_url": "https://gist.github.com/aa5a315d61ae9438b18d",
    "files": {
      "hello_world.rb": {
        "filename": "hello_world.rb",
        "type": "application/x-ruby",
        "language": "Ruby",

});

    List starred gists

    GET
    https://api.github.com/gists/starred

    List the authenticated user's starred gists:

    Parameters

    sincestring<date-time>query

    Only show results that were last updated after the given time. This is a timestamp in ISO 8601 format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ.

    per_pageinteger30query

    The number of results per page (max 100). For more information, see "Using pagination in the REST API."

    pageinteger1query

    The page number of the results to fetch. For more information, see "Using pagination in the REST API."

    Response

    200OKArray<base-gist>

    Response

    304Not Modified

    Not modified

    401Unauthorizedbasic-error

    Requires authentication

    403Forbiddenbasic-error

    Forbidden

    List starred gists
    Copy
    curl -X GET 'https://api.github.com/gists/starred'
    const response = await fetch('https://api.github.com/gists/starred', {
  method: 'GET',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.get('https://api.github.com/gists/starred')
data = response.json()
    Copy

    Get a gist

    GET
    https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}

    Gets a specified gist.

    This endpoint supports the following custom media types. For more information, see "Media types."

    • application/vnd.github.raw+json: Returns the raw markdown. This is the default if you do not pass any specific media type.

    Parameters

    gist_idstringrequiredpath

    The unique identifier of the gist.

    Response

    200OKgist-simple

    Response

    304Not Modified

    Not modified

    403Forbiddenobject

    Forbidden Gist

    404Not Foundbasic-error

    Resource not found

    Get a gist
    Copy
    curl -X GET 'https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}'
    const response = await fetch('https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}', {
  method: 'GET',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.get('https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}')
data = response.json()
    Copy

    Delete a gist

    DELETE
    https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}

    Parameters

    gist_idstringrequiredpath

    The unique identifier of the gist.

    Response

    204No Content

    Response

    304Not Modified

    Not modified

    403Forbiddenbasic-error

    Forbidden

    404Not Foundbasic-error

    Resource not found

    Delete a gist
    Copy
    curl -X DELETE 'https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}'
    const response = await fetch('https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}', {
  method: 'DELETE',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.delete('https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}')
data = response.json()
    Copy
    {
  "message": "string",
  "documentation_url": "string",
  "url": "string",
  "status": "string"
}
    {
  "message": "string",

    Delete a gist
    Copy
    curl -X DELETE 'https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}'
    const response = await fetch('https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}', {
  method: 'DELETE',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.delete('https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}')
data = response.json()

    Update a gist

    PATCH
    https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}

    Allows you to update a gist's description and to update, delete, or rename gist files. Files from the previous version of the gist that aren't explicitly changed during an edit are unchanged.

    At least one of description or files is required.

    This endpoint supports the following custom media types. For more information, see "Media types."

    • application/vnd.github.raw+json: Returns the raw markdown. This is the default if you do not pass any specific media type.

    Body

    application/json
    descriptionstring

    The description of the gist.

    filesobject

    The gist files to be updated, renamed, or deleted. Each key must match the current filename (including extension) of the targeted gist file. For example: hello.py.

    To delete a file, set the whole file to null. For example: hello.py : null. The file will also be deleted if the specified object does not contain at least one of content or filename.

    Parameters

    gist_idstringrequiredpath

    The unique identifier of the gist.

    Response

    200OKgist-simple

    Response

    404Not Foundbasic-error

    Resource not found

    422Unprocessable Entityvalidation-error

    Validation failed, or the endpoint has been spammed.

    Update a gist
    Copy
    curl -X PATCH 'https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "description": "Example Ruby script",
    "files": {
      "hello.rb": {
        "content": "blah",
        "filename": "goodbye.rb"
      }
    }
  }'
    const response = await fetch('https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}', {
  method: 'PATCH',
  headers: {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
      "description": "Example Ruby script",
      "files": {
        "hello.rb": {
          "content": "blah",
          "filename": "goodbye.rb"
        }
      }
    }),
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

payload = {
  "description": "Example Ruby script",
  "files": {
    "hello.rb": {
      "content": "blah",
      "filename": "goodbye.rb"
    }
  }
}

response = requests.patch('https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}', json=payload)
data = response.json()
    Request Body
    Copy
    {
  "description": "An updated gist description",
  "files": {
    "README.md": {
      "content": "Hello World from GitHub"
    }
  }
}
    {
  "files": {
    "hello.py": null
  }
}
    {
  "files": {
    "hello.py": {
      "filename": "goodbye.py"
    }
  }
}

    Update a gist
    Copy
    curl -X PATCH 'https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "description": "Example Ruby script",
    "files": {
      "hello.rb": {
        "content": "blah",
        "filename": "goodbye.rb"
      }
    }
  }'
    const response = await fetch('https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}', {
  method: 'PATCH',
  headers: {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
      "description": "Example Ruby script",
      "files": {
        "hello.rb": {
          "content": "blah",
          "filename": "goodbye.rb"
        }
      }
    }),
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

payload = {
  "description": "Example Ruby script",
  "files": {
    "hello.rb": {
      "content": "blah",
      "filename": "goodbye.rb"
    }
  }
}

response = requests.patch('https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}', json=payload)
data = response.json()
    Request Body
    Copy
    {
  "description": "An updated gist description",
  "files": {
    "README.md": {
      "content": "Hello World from GitHub"
    }
  }
}
    {
  "files": {
    "hello.py": null
  }
}
    {
  "files": {
    "hello.py": {
      "filename": "goodbye.py"
    }
  }
}

    List gist comments

    GET
    https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}/comments

    Lists the comments on a gist.

    This endpoint supports the following custom media types. For more information, see "Media types."

    • application/vnd.github.raw+json: Returns the raw markdown. This is the default if you do not pass any specific media type.

    Parameters

    gist_idstringrequiredpath

    The unique identifier of the gist.

    per_pageinteger30query

    The number of results per page (max 100). For more information, see "Using pagination in the REST API."

    pageinteger1query

    The page number of the results to fetch. For more information, see "Using pagination in the REST API."

    Response

    200OKArray<gist-comment>

    Response

    304Not Modified

    Not modified

    403Forbiddenbasic-error

    Forbidden

    404Not Foundbasic-error

    Resource not found

    List gist comments
    Copy
    curl -X GET 'https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}/comments'
    const response = await fetch('https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}/comments', {
  method: 'GET',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.get('https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}/comments')
data = response.json()
    Copy
    [
  {
    "id": 1,
    "node_id": "MDExOkdpc3RDb21tZW50MQ==",
    "url": "https://api.github.com/gists/a6db0bec360bb87e9418/comments/1",
    "body": "Just commenting for the sake of commenting",
    "user": {
      "login": "octocat",
      "id": 1,
      "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjE=",
      "avatar_url": "https://github.com/images/error/octocat_happy.gif",

      "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/octocat/starred{/owner}{/repo}",

    Create a gist comment

    POST
    https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}/comments

    Creates a comment on a gist.

    This endpoint supports the following custom media types. For more information, see "Media types."

    • application/vnd.github.raw+json: Returns the raw markdown. This is the default if you do not pass any specific media type.

    Body

    application/json
    bodystringrequired

    The comment text.

    Parameters

    gist_idstringrequiredpath

    The unique identifier of the gist.

    Response

    201Createdgist-comment

    Response

    304Not Modified

    Not modified

    403Forbiddenbasic-error

    Forbidden

    404Not Foundbasic-error

    Resource not found

    Create a gist comment
    Copy
    curl -X POST 'https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}/comments' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
    "body": "Body of the attachment"
  }'
    const response = await fetch('https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}/comments', {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
  },
  body: JSON.stringify({
      "body": "Body of the attachment"
    }),
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

payload = {
  "body": "Body of the attachment"
}

response = requests.post('https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}/comments', json=payload)
data = response.json()
    Request Body
    Copy
    {
  "body": "This is a comment to a gist"
}
    Copy
    {
  "id": 1,
  "node_id": "MDExOkdpc3RDb21tZW50MQ==",
  "url": "https://api.github.com/gists/a6db0bec360bb87e9418/comments/1",
  "body": "Just commenting for the sake of commenting",
  "user": {
    "login": "octocat",
    "id": 1,
    "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjE=",
    "avatar_url": "https://github.com/images/error/octocat_happy.gif",

    "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/octocat/followers",
    "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/octocat/following{/other_user}",
    "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/octocat/gists{/gist_id}",
    "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/octocat/starred{/owner}{/repo}",

    Get a gist comment

    GET
    https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}/comments/{comment_id}

    Gets a comment on a gist.

    This endpoint supports the following custom media types. For more information, see "Media types."

    • application/vnd.github.raw+json: Returns the raw markdown. This is the default if you do not pass any specific media type.

    Parameters

    gist_idstringrequiredpath

    The unique identifier of the gist.

    comment_idinteger<int64>requiredpath

    The unique identifier of the comment.

    Response

    200OKgist-comment

    Response

    304Not Modified

    Not modified

    403Forbiddenobject

    Forbidden Gist

    404Not Foundbasic-error

    Resource not found

    Get a gist comment
    Copy
    curl -X GET 'https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}/comments/{comment_id}'
    const response = await fetch('https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}/comments/{comment_id}', {
  method: 'GET',
});

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

response = requests.get('https://api.github.com/gists/{gist_id}/comments/{comment_id}')
data = response.json()
    Copy
    {
  "id": 1,

    Copy

const data = await response.json();
    import requests

    gist-comment

    object

    A comment made to a gist.

    idintegerrequired
    node_idstringrequired
    urlstring<uri>required
    bodystringrequired

    The comment text.

    usernullable-simple-user | nullrequired

    A GitHub user.

    Show child attributes
    namestring | null
    emailstring | null
    loginstringrequired
    idinteger<int64>required
    node_idstringrequired
    avatar_urlstring<uri>required
    gravatar_idstring | nullrequired
    urlstring<uri>required
    html_urlstring<uri>required
    followers_urlstring<uri>required
    following_urlstringrequired
    gists_urlstringrequired
    starred_urlstringrequired
    subscriptions_urlstring<uri>required
    organizations_urlstring<uri>required
    repos_urlstring<uri>required
    events_urlstringrequired
    received_events_urlstring<uri>required
    typestringrequired
    site_adminbooleanrequired
    starred_atstring
    user_view_typestring
    created_atstring<date-time>required
    updated_atstring<date-time>required
    author_associationauthor-associationCOLLABORATORCONTRIBUTORFIRST_TIMERFIRST_TIME_CONTRIBUTORMANNEQUINMEMBERNONEOWNERrequired

    How the author is associated with the repository.

    Example
    Copy
    {
  "id": 1,
  "node_id": "MDExOkdpc3RDb21tZW50MQ==",
  "url": "https://api.github.com/gists/a6db0bec360bb87e9418/comments/1",
  "body": "Body of the attachment",
  "user": {
    "name": "string",
    "email": "string",
    "login": "octocat",
    "id": 1,
    "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjE=",
    "avatar_url": "https://github.com/images/error/octocat_happy.gif",
    "gravatar_id": "41d064eb2195891e12d0413f63227ea7",
    "url": "https://api.github.com/users/octocat",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/octocat",
    "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/octocat/followers",
    "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/octocat/following{/other_user}",
    "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/octocat/gists{/gist_id}",
    "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/octocat/starred{/owner}{/repo}",
    "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/octocat/subscriptions",
    "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/octocat/orgs",
    "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/octocat/repos",
    "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/octocat/events{/privacy}",
    "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/octocat/received_events",
    "type": "User",
    "site_admin": true,
    "starred_at": "\"2020-07-09T00:17:55Z\"",
    "user_view_type": "public"
  },
  "created_at": "2011-04-18T23:23:56Z",
  "updated_at": "2011-04-18T23:23:56Z",
  "author_association": "OWNER"
}

    updated_atstring<date-time>required
    planobject
    Show child attributes
    collaboratorsintegerrequired
    namestringrequired
    spaceintegerrequired
    private_reposintegerrequired
    private_gistsinteger
    total_private_reposinteger
    owned_private_reposinteger
    disk_usageinteger
    collaboratorsinteger

    gist-history

    object

    Gist History

    usernullable-simple-user | null

    A GitHub user.

    Show child attributes
    namestring | null
    emailstring | null
    loginstringrequired
    idinteger<int64>required
    node_idstringrequired
    avatar_urlstring<uri>required
    gravatar_idstring | nullrequired
    urlstring<uri>required
    html_urlstring<uri>required
    followers_urlstring<uri>required
    following_urlstringrequired
    gists_urlstringrequired
    starred_urlstringrequired
    subscriptions_urlstring<uri>required
    organizations_urlstring<uri>required
    repos_urlstring<uri>required
    events_urlstringrequired
    received_events_urlstring<uri>required
    typestringrequired
    site_adminbooleanrequired
    starred_atstring
    user_view_typestring
    versionstring
    committed_atstring<date-time>
    change_statusobject
    Show child attributes
    totalinteger
    additionsinteger
    deletionsinteger
    urlstring<uri>
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "user": {
    "name": "string",
    "email": "string",
    "login": "octocat",
    "id": 1,
    "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjE=",
    "avatar_url": "https://github.com/images/error/octocat_happy.gif",
    "gravatar_id": "41d064eb2195891e12d0413f63227ea7",
    "url": "https://api.github.com/users/octocat",
    "html_url": "https://github.com/octocat",
    "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/octocat/followers",
    "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/octocat/following{/other_user}",
    "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/octocat/gists{/gist_id}",
    "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/octocat/starred{/owner}{/repo}",
    "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/octocat/subscriptions",
    "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/octocat/orgs",
    "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/octocat/repos",
    "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/octocat/events{/privacy}",
    "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/octocat/received_events",
    "type": "User",
    "site_admin": true,
    "starred_at": "\"2020-07-09T00:17:55Z\"",
    "user_view_type": "public"
  },
  "version": "string",
  "committed_at": "2024-01-15T09:30:00Z",
  "change_status": {
    "total": 0,
    "additions": 0,
    "deletions": 0
  },
  "url": "https://example.com"
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "user": {
    "name": "string",
    "email": "string",

    validation-error

    object

    Validation Error

    messagestringrequired
    documentation_urlstringrequired
    errorsArray<object>
    Show child attributes
    resourcestring
    fieldstring
    messagestring
    codestringrequired
    indexinteger
    valuestring | integer | Array<string>
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "message": "string",
  "documentation_url": "string",
  "errors": [
    {
      "resource": "string",
      "field": "string",
      "message": "string",
      "code": "string",
      "index": 0,
      "value": "string"
    }
  ]
}
    Example
    Copy
    {
  "message": "string",
  "documentation_url": "string",
  "errors": [
    {
      "resource": "string",
      "field": "string",
      "message": "string",
      "code": "string",
      "index": 0,
      "value": "string"
    }
  ]
}

    author-association

    string

    How the author is associated with the repository.

    author-associationCOLLABORATORCONTRIBUTORFIRST_TIMERFIRST_TIME_CONTRIBUTORMANNEQUINMEMBERNONEOWNER

    Copy
    "OWNER"
